/Users/lobsternaut/software/space-data-network-project/packages/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++             -s WASM=1             -s MODULARIZE=1             -s EXPORT_ES6=1             -s EXPORT_NAME='SWPC_WASM'             -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall','cwrap','UTF8ToString','stringToUTF8','lengthBytesUTF8']             -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_parse','_convert','_malloc','_free']             -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1             -s NO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1             -s ENVIRONMENT='web,node'             -s DISABLE_EXCEPTION_CATCHING=0             --bind             -O2          @CMakeFiles/swpc_forecast.dir/objects1.rsp -o /Users/lobsternaut/.openclaw/workspace/space-weather-forecast-sdn-plugin/wasm/node/swpc_forecast.js
